Tentang_Perusahaan:
PT Quad Sinergi Teknologi (QST) adalah perusahaan teknologi informasi yang berdiri sejak 2014, berfokus pada penyediaan solusi infrastruktur IT, keamanan jaringan, cloud system, dan data analytics. 
QST terdiri dari profesional berpengalaman yang berkomitmen memberikan solusi bernilai bagi klien dengan mengintegrasikan infrastruktur dan arsitektur data melalui perencanaan yang matang. 
 Tujuan QST adalah membantu klien mencapai target bisnis melalui solusi teknologi yang agile, aman, efisien, dan berperforma tinggi. 
Mereka menyediakan layanan seperti: 
 
 Transformasi dan integrasi infrastruktur bisnis penting (critical-business system) 
 Cloud architecture, hyper-converged, colocation, dan microservices 
 Solusi keamanan jaringan (firewall, SD-WAN, IAM, SIEM) 
 Data management dan big data analytics (machine learning, predictive analytics, RPA) 
 Preventive & corrective maintenance serta managed services

 Strong communication by can deliver concise, decision-grade summaries, not only charts.  
 
 
 Nice To Have:

Deskripsi:
Deskripsi Perusahaan  
 PT  Waschen Alora Indonesia (Alora Group) adalah sebuah entitas induk perusahan yang memiliki core business di bidang jasa kebersihan, seperti: Laundry rumah sakit (Healtcare Laundry), Penyewaan linen rumah sakit (Linen Rental), Laundry untuk Perusahaan (Corporate Laundry), Laundry Retail (residence), Jasa kebersihan rumah (Home Care) dan Jasa Kebersihan Kantor (Office Care).  
 Kami mengundang talenta terbaik yang memiliki dedikasi, berpikiran terbuka (growth mindset) dan loyalitas untuk pengembangan karir dan pengembangan bisnis demi kemajuan bersama di masa depan. Kami tidak mencari sekadar analis data. Kami mencari “arsitek pertumbuhan”, seseorang yang mampu mengubah data menjadi strategi, dan strategi menjadi dampak nyata.  Kami mencari “problem solver berbasis data”, seseorang yang mampu melihat pola di balik angka, memahami bisnis secara mendalam, dan mengubah insight menjadi keputusan strategis. 
 Di peran ini, Anda akan berada di jantung pengambilan keputusan memahami apa yang benar-benar bekerja, apa yang tidak, dan ke mana kita harus melangkah berikutnya. 
 
 
Tanggung Jawab (Job Description) 
 1.	Turn Data Into Strategic Insight 
 
 Melakukan analisis data dan riset pasar untuk memahami tren industri, kebutuhan pelanggan, posisi kompetitif perusahaan serta peluang dan area yang perlu ditingkatkan dalam operasional bisnis. 
 Melakukan riset dan analisis mendalam (in-depth analysis) terhadap customer, marketing metrics, competitor landscape, serta tren marketing terbaru untuk mengidentifikasi peluang dan menutup gap pada produk maupun funnel. 
 Menggali data operasional, data pelanggan, data pasar untuk menemukan pola, peluang, dan risiko yang tidak terlihat oleh orang lain.  
 
 
 2.	Drive Decision-Making 
 
 Menyajikan insight yang tajam dan relevan untuk membantu manajemen mengambil keputusan berbasis data, bukan asumsi. 
 Bertanggung jawab atas fungsi analitik dengan merancang strategi pelacakan (tracking), membangun kerangka pengukuran (measurement framework), serta memberikan insight yang jelas terkait aktivitas operasional dan marketing. 
 Berkolaborasi dengan tim lintas fungsi untuk memberikan insight yang mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis 
 
 
 3.	Solve Real Business Problems 
 
 Mengidentifikasi bottleneck, inefficiency, dan peluang growth dalam proses bisnis, lalu memberikan solusi yang actionable. 
 Mendukung pelaksanaan A/B testing dan desain eksperimen, memastikan setiap project dapat diukur dengan baik dan hasilnya valid secara statistik.  
 
 
 4.	Build Data-Driven System 
 
 Mengembangkan dashboard, model analitik, dan framework pengukuran yang menjadi fondasi pengambilan keputusan perusahaan. 
 
 
 5.	Collaborate Across Functions 
 
 Bekerja lintas tim (Operations, Marketing, Finance, Product) untuk memastikan setiap strategi didukung oleh data yang solid. 
 
 
 Kualifikasi (Requirements) 
 
 Pendidikan minimal Diploma/Sarjana di bidang terkait (relevan). 
 Memiliki pengalaman bekerja minimal 1 s.d. 5 tahun dibidang data analyst dan business analyst (lebih diutamakan yang menguasai market research dan marketing analysis). 
 Mampu berpikir kritis dan sistematis serta mampu menghubungkan data dengan konteks bisnis. 
 Pengalaman dalam menggunakan alat analisis data (Google Analytics, Power BI, SQL, Python dan tools sejenisnya), termasuk kemampuan mengolah big data secara efisien. 
 Berpengalaman membuat dashboard menggunakan tools visualisasi data (Metabase, Tableau, Looker, Power BI atau sejenisnya). 
 Memahami berbagai channel digital marketing (iklan berbayar, SEO, referral, pertumbuhan organik, kampanye CRM). 
 Memahami statistik, analisis tren, dan machine learning dasar. 
 Kemampuan untuk bekerja dengan data besar dan kompleks.  
 Berpikir analitis, detail-oriented, serta mampu menyajikan data secara logis. 
 Komunikatif & kolaboratif, bisa bekerja sama dengan tim marketing, sales, dan operasional. 
 Lancar berbahasa Inggris. 
 
 
 
 Kompensani dan Benefit 
 
 Gaji dan tunjangan yang kompetitif dengan insentif (bonus) kinerja. 
 BPJS (Asuransi kesehatan). 
 Exposure langsung ke decision-making level. 
 Lingkungan kerja yang mendorong thinking, ownership, dan impact. 
 Kesempatan berkembang menjadi future leader di bidang data, business & strategy.

Deskripsi:
Role Overview 
 As a System Analyst (SA) at DDN, you are not merely a technical document writer, but the guardian of system clarity. You bridge abstract business needs with concrete technical solutions, ensuring that requirements are structured, feasible, and clearly understood by all stakeholders. You will be involved from the early discovery phase through documentation and implementation support, ensuring developers and QA teams have clear, structured, and testable references. 
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
 Elicit, analyze, and clarify business requirements together with clients and/or Business Analysts. 
 Translate business needs into structured technical documentation (SRS, Use Case, ERD, UML, logical wireframes). 
 Provide technical input to BA and PMO regarding scope definition, prioritization, and feasibility. 
 Act as the primary reference for developers in understanding system requirements. 
 Collaborate with QA to ensure requirements are fully covered in test cases. 
 Align business expectations with technical constraints and system capabilities. 
 
 
 Minimum Qualifications 
 
 Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field. 
 Graduates from reputable universities (national or international). 
 2–3 years of experience as a System Analyst or similar role. 
 Strong ability to produce structured technical documentation (SRS, ERD, UML, etc.). 
 Familiar with Agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban) and effort estimation (story points). 
 Proficient in system analysis tools (Draw.io, Lucidchart, Figma, or similar). 
 Solid understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).

 - Gelar sarjana dalam bidang Ilmu Komputer, Keuangan, atau bidang terkait.

 - Pengetahuan mendalam tentang teknik penipuan yang umumnya digunakan di sektor perbankan dan cara mendeteksinya. 
 - Kemampuan dalam penggunaan perangkat lunak dan alat analisis data seperti Python, R, SQL, dan perangkat analisis data terkait. 
 - Kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, termasuk kemampuan untuk berinteraksi dengan klien bank secara efektif dan memberikan laporan dan rekomendasi dengan jelas.

Deskripsi:
PT. SAHADA LAKU UTAMA, sebuah perusahaan yang dipandu oleh prinsip spiritual dan filosofi Kaizen, menawarkan kesempatan yang istimewa bagi Anda yang ingin tumbuh dan berkembang. Dengan misi untuk menciptakan pertumbuhan yang kuat dan eksponensial, kami percaya bahwa setiap individu memiliki potensi yang luar biasa. Kami memberikan dukungan yang mendalam untuk membantu Anda melewati batas-batas kenyamanan dan mencapai potensi penuh diri Anda. Kami di sini untuk membentuk generasi yang lebih kuat, baik secara fisik maupun mental, dengan produk unggulan kami, Gamamilk, yang tidak hanya sehat tetapi juga mendukung ekonomi UMKM. 
 
 Kami sedang mencari Data Analyst yang bersemangat untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Manguharjo, Madiun, Jawa Timur. Kami yakin bahwa posisi ini akan menarik bagi Anda yang ingin berkontribusi dalam peningkatan kualitas produk kami dan mengembangkan strategi bisnis yang lebih efektif. Dengan bergabung dengan Sahada, Anda akan bekerja dalam lingkungan yang penuh semangat, di mana setiap individu dapat berkembang dan berkontribusi secara signifikan terhadap pencapaian tujuan perusahaan. Kami mencari individu yang tidak hanya memiliki keahlian teknis, tetapi juga memiliki tekad yang kuat untuk menghasilkan dampak positif bagi masyarakat. 
 
 **Tugas Utama:** 
 
 Sebagai Data Analyst, Anda akan bertanggung jawab atas analisis data yang mendukung pengambilan keputusan bisnis. Anda akan bekerja sama dengan tim untuk mengumpulkan, memproses, dan menganalisis data yang relevan. Tugas utama Anda mencakup pembuatan laporan analitis, visualisasi data, serta pemantauan tren dan hasil operasional. Anda akan memastikan bahwa data yang digunakan oleh tim manajemen untuk mengambil keputusan adalah akurat, relevan, dan terorganisir. Selain itu, Anda juga akan bertanggung jawab atas pengembangan model prediktif yang dapat digunakan untuk memprediksi tren pasar dan mengidentifikasi peluang bisnis baru. 
 
 **Kualifikasi:** 
 
 Kami mencari kandidat yang memiliki pendidikan diploma dengan latar belakang ilmu statistik, matematika, atau ilmu komputer. Kandidat yang memiliki pengalaman antara satu hingga tiga tahun dalam bidang analisis data akan dipertimbangkan. Keahlian yang diperlukan termasuk penggunaan perangkat lunak seperti Redis, Microsoft Excel, SQL, Microsoft SQL Server, Data Analysis, dan Statistics. Keterampilan ini akan membantu Anda dalam memastikan bahwa data yang digunakan untuk pengambilan keputusan bisnis adalah akurat dan terorganisir. Kami mencari individu yang tidak hanya memiliki keahlian teknis, tetapi juga memiliki sikap profesional yang kuat dan komitmen untuk memberikan kontribusi yang signifikan terhadap tujuan perusahaan.
Tentang_Perusahaan:
Spiritual, Kaizen, Dealdone! Pertumbuhan yang kuat dan eksponensial. 
 Halo! perkenalkan kami Sahada, atau bisa disebut juga rumah kedua. Mencari ilmu dan mengembangkan potensi bakat yang dimiliki bisa dimana saja, begitu juga dengan pengembangan karir yang bisa membuatmu makin bernilai dimata dunia.  We are looking for a detail-oriented and analytical QA Analyst to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality, stability, and reliability of our software products through structured manual testing and close collaboration with cross-functional teams. 
 Ultimately, you will ensure that our products and applications work correctly. 
 If you are passionate about quality, enjoy problem-solving, and thrive in an Agile environment, we would love to meet you. 
 
 Essential Duties & Responsibilities: 
 
 Review and analyse system specifications. 
 Design, develop, and execute detailed manual test cases and test scenarios for multiple platforms including iOS and Android. 
 Familiarity with Agile frameworks and regression testing is a plus. 
 Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Developers, and Tech Support teams. 
 Identify and report bugs and errors with clear reproduction steps. 
 Ability to document and troubleshoot errors. 
 Maintains documentation of test operations and reports results.  
 
 
 Basic Qualifications: 
 
 BSc/BA in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field. 
 Preferably 1-2 Years’ of software testing experience is essential.  
 Strong understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies. 
 Experience in automation testing tools is an added advantage. 
 
 ISTQB or CSQE Certifications are a plus.

Tentang_Perusahaan:
BORWITA GROUP adalah perusahaan distributor independen yang terfokus di Indonesia bagian timur. Didirikan pada tahun 1976 oleh Bapak Hady Karyono, Borwita terlibat dalam bisnis distribusi farmasi yang berbasis di Surabaya. Bisnis perusahaan berkembang pesat dan pada tahun 1988, Borwita memulai distribusi produk konsumtif. 
 Didorong oleh pertumbuhan yang cepat dari divisi distribusi produk konsumtif, PT. Borwita Citra Prima (BCP) didirikan pada tahun 1995. Sampai sekarang, BCP mendistribusikan  berbagai macam produk konsumtif, termasuk perawatan pribadi &  kebersihan, makanan, minuman dan makanan ringan. Prinsipal dari BCP adalah pemimpin pasar dalam segmennya masing-masing dan mencakup perusahaan multinasional (MNCs) serta perusahaan berkembang. 
 Jangkauan distribusi Borwita saat ini di seluruh Jakarta Timur, Jawa  Barat, Jawa Tengah, Jawa Timur, Bali, Lombok, Nusa Tenggara Timur, Nusa  Tenggara Barat, Sulawesi, Maluku, dan Irian Jaya. Karyawan kami 6,000+ orang adalah aset terbesar kami yang memungkinkan kami untuk meliput 460,000+ outlet di semua segmen, mulai dari hypermarket, supermarket,  minimarket, grosir, pengecer besar, dan toko kecil. Secara operasional,  infrastruktur Borwita mencakup 42 gudang, dengan posisi yang strategis di seluruh jangkauan Borwita, 472 pengiriman dengan truk dan 467 pengiriman dengan sepeda motor beroperasi dari 170 kantor cabang. (Data per Desember 2020). 
 Sejak tahun 2014, Borwita telah memperluas bisnisnya untuk memulai  unit Layanan Logistik. Memanfaatkan jaringan dan infrastrukturnya yang  kuat, didukung oleh pengalaman profesional logistik yang kuat &  mendalam, Borwita Logistic telah mampu menyediakan & melayani solusi  untuk pelanggannya dalam pergudangan, berbagai macam pengiriman, dan  cross-docking. Borwita Logistics melayani layanan logistik untuk P&G, Frisian Flag Indonesia, Pocari Sweat, Nutrifood, Big Cola, SC Johnson, dan banyak lagi. 
 Ke depan, BORWITA GROUP bercita-cita untuk menjadi perusahaan distribusi, logistik, dan e-commerce terkemuka yang terbaik di kelasnya.

Skills: Telecom Bss Domain Knowledge, Business Analysis, CRM, Integration Analysis, Problem Solving, Analytical Skills, Technical Documentation
Deskripsi:
Responsibilities  
 
 Gather, analyze, and document requirements with Product Owners, Architects, and business users; translate needs into user stories, use cases, acceptance criteria, and functional specifications.  
 Analyze and design end-to-end BSS commercial-to-cash flows, including product/offer definition (catalog & pricing rules), customer lifecycle (CRM/party), ordering & orchestration (order management), and billing & invoicing (accounting, adjustments), including revenue-impact touchpoints where applicable.  
 Define functional behavior, validations, business rules, configuration logic, and clear edge-case handling to ensure consistent implementation.  
 Produce solution artifacts such as Functional Specification Documents (FSD), BPMN/UML process flows, sequence diagrams, integration contracts, and API specifications (OpenAPI/Swagger) when needed.  
 Document BSS integration points and dependencies (channels, downstream analytics/mediation, and OSS touchpoints where relevant) and align payloads/data mapping across interfaces.  
 Act as the primary clarification point for Development and QA to ensure delivery matches intent; support grooming, test scenario review, UAT readiness, and defect triage from a functional perspective.  
 Execute targeted PoCs/experiments to validate solution designs, test assumptions, and de-risk complex initiatives.  
 Maintain standards, reusable patterns, and a knowledge base for BSS modeling/configuration and integration guidance.  
 
 
 Requirements 
 
 2–3 years of experience in the Telecommunications industry as a System Analyst / Business Analyst / Solution Designer.  
 Deep understanding of at least one core BSS area (e.g., Product Catalog, CRM, Order Management, Billing) and its role in the end-to-end service lifecycle.  
 Demonstrable experience producing detailed technical documentation (FSD, API specs, UML/BPMN) and translating business needs into technical requirements.  
 Strong analytical skills: can model complex business scenarios and propose clear, logical solutions.  
 Strong communication: able to explain technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.

Deskripsi:
Threads & Harmony is a Bandung-born fashion ecommerce company building house brands (starting with Nabilaze). We prototype fast, launch weekly, and scale what works. We are rooted in Bandung's UNESCO Creative City of Design heritage and pair local craftsmanship with modern tooling — ERP, live-commerce, AI- assisted creative, and automated marketplace operations. 
 We are looking for a sharp, hands-on Procurement Analyst who can bring structure to our raw material sourcing, eliminate stockouts, and build a supplier ecosystem that keeps pace with our aggressive launch cadence. 
 
 What You Will Own 
 
 Map, qualify, and manage a panel of raw material suppliers (fabrics, trims, packaging) across Bandung and the broader Jawa Barat region 
 Build and maintain a real-time raw material inventory tracker — the company currently has no supplier management system, and fixing that is your first priority 
 Develop and enforce minimum stock level policies to eliminate chronic material shortages 
 Negotiate pricing, MOQs, lead times, and payment terms with suppliers 
 Run weekly demand-vs-stock reviews aligned to the production and design calendar 
 Onboard new suppliers, conduct site visits, and maintain supplier scorecards (quality, on-time delivery, price competitiveness) 
 Coordinate with the production and design teams to translate weekly launch plans into material purchase orders 
 Identify and mitigate supply-chain risks before they hit the production line 
 Use data to flag slow-moving stock, overstock, and reorder points — reporting to leadership in clear, visual dashboards 
 Assist in evaluating and implementing a lightweight ERP or procurement module 
 
 
 What We Are Looking For 
 
 2–4 years of procurement, supply chain, or inventory management experience — preferably in fashion, textiles, or FMCG 
 Hands-on knowledge of textile and fabric categories (woven, knit, interlinings, trims) is a strong plus 
 Proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets for inventory modelling; experience with any ERP or WMS is a bonus 
 AI fluency — comfort using tools like ChatGPT or similar to accelerate analysis, drafting supplier communications, or building templates 
 Analytical mindset: you think in numbers, spot anomalies, and know how to build a reorder point formula 
 Strong negotiator with vendor relationship skills — firm but fair 
 Organised, detail-oriented, and thrives in a fast-paced, launch-heavy environment 
 Bahasa Indonesia required; working English is a plus 
 
 
 Nice to Have 
 
 Experience with Shopee or TikTok Shop supply chains 
 Familiarity with local Bandung or Jawa Barat fabric markets (Pasar Baru Trade Center, etc.) 
 Background in demand forecasting or S&OP 
 
 
 Why Join Us 
 
 You will build the procurement function from scratch — high ownership, high impact 
 Work with a tight, data-driven team at one of Bandung's fastest-moving fashion startups 
 Competitive salary benchmarked to market, with performance-linked upside 
 Direct access to senior leadership; your decisions shape what gets made

Deskripsi:
Are you someone who enjoys solving problems and making things run smoothly behind the scenes? We’re looking for a  Technical Analyst  to join our team and support a dynamic client in the vacation rental industry. In this role, you will help investigate technical and data-related issues, support users, and ensure pricing accuracy and synchronization across connected platforms. The responsibilities below outline the core focus areas of this role. 
 We offer a  hybrid working arrangement , combining remote flexibility with in-office collaboration to help you stay productive while staying connected with the team. 
 
 What You'll Be Doing 
 1. Handling Technical Issues (Reactive) 
 Investigate technical and data-related issues reported by users or internal teams. You will analyze problems, replicate scenarios, identify root causes, and propose clear solutions or requirements to support implementation by the development or related teams. 
 2. Ensuring Pricing Accuracy & System Alignment 
 Work closely with data and integration processes to ensure pricing, fees, taxes, and related information remain accurate and consistently synchronized across connected systems and partners. You will help investigate discrepancies, validate data flows, and support corrective actions when needed. 
 3. Proactive Monitoring & Improvement 
 Regularly review system behavior and data patterns to identify potential inconsistencies or areas for improvement. You will highlight findings and suggest preventive steps to improve reliability and data quality. 
 4. Documentation 
 Document your findings, processes, and resolutions clearly to support knowledge sharing and reduce recurring issues. 
 5. Team Collaboration 
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to validate solutions, clarify requirements, and resolve issues in a structured and timely manner. 
 
 What You Bring 
 -  A Curious and Analytical Mind  - You enjoy understanding how systems work and figuring out why something behaves a certain way. 
 -  Clear Communication (English & Bahasa Indonesia)  - You can explain technical topics in a clear and structured way, both verbally and in writing. 
 -  Technical Skills  - Experience with SQL, APIs, and Google Workspace is required. Familiarity with Python, PHP, or AWS is a plus. 
 -  Team-Oriented Attitude  - You are comfortable working with others and sharing information openly. 
 -  Organized Working Style  - You keep track of your work and maintain clear documentation. 
 
 Your Background 
 1. A degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related technical field. 
 2. At least 1 year of experience in tech support, software development, QA/testing, SaaS, or a similar environment. 
 3. A willingness to learn, take initiative, and grow in a structured technical role.

 Job Responsibilities:

 Solid understanding of ETL/ELT concepts, data pipelines, and basic data warehousing and data modeling. 
 Familiarity with relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and version control systems such as Git. 
 Experience with data tools and technologies such as Airflow/Prefect, dbt, cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure), or distributed processing frameworks (e.g., Spark) is a plus. 
 Strong problem-solving skills, effective communication, and the ability to work both independently and collaboratively with a proactive, growth-oriented mindset.

Deskripsi:
JULO is one of Indonesia's leading digital lending platforms, serving over 3 million borrowers across all 38 provinces. Our models directly determine who gets access to credit and on what terms. That means the work you do here has real, measurable impact on financial inclusion for millions of underbanked Indonesians. 
 We're looking for a Data Scientist to join a small, focused team. You'll work end-to-end: from exploring raw data to deploying models in production, and you'll have a direct line to leadership on how data products shape business decisions. 
 If you're the kind of person who thrives when given real problems and the autonomy to solve them, this role will give you more responsibility and learning than most mid-level positions at larger companies. 
 
 What You’ll Do 
 
 Build, validate, and maintain machine learning models for credit risk scoring, fraud detection, and customer behavior prediction. 
 Own production model pipelines end-to-end: from data extraction and feature engineering through deployment and monitoring. 
 Design and run A/B experiments with proper statistical rigor to test and improve lending strategies. 
 Use predictive analytics to optimize decisions across risk management, marketing, collections, and customer experience. 
 Work directly with leadership and cross-functional teams to translate business problems into data-driven solutions. 
 Contribute to new product development by building data products that improve how we serve our users. 
 
 What We're Looking For

Deskripsi:
PT Smart Lab Indonesia, a pioneer in chemical analysis reagents since 2002, has been a cornerstone of the local industry, proudly recognized for its commitment to producing high-quality chemical products. With state-of-the-art facilities and ISO 9001:2015 certification, Smart Lab stands out as a leader in the field, ensuring that its customers receive reliable and competitive solutions for their laboratory needs. Our mission is to provide locally sourced yet internationally competitive products, thereby supporting the growth of the Indonesian economy through our strong local content (TKDN) compliance. As we continue to expand our product range and service offerings, we seek to enhance our team with talented professionals who share our vision for excellence in chemical analysis. 
 
 We are currently looking to expand our Quality Control department with a dedicated Quality Control Analyst Kimia. This role is crucial in ensuring the precision and reliability of our chemical products, aligning with our commitment to excellence. Join us at Smart Lab, where your expertise will contribute to the development of innovative solutions for the laboratory sector. Your contributions will help us maintain our position as a leader in chemical analysis, providing top-tier products at competitive prices. 
 
 As a Quality Control Analyst Kimia, you will be responsible for conducting rigorous quality checks on all chemical products manufactured by Smart Lab. Your primary duties will include performing chemical analyses, ensuring adherence to quality standards, and maintaining accurate records of all testing processes. You will also collaborate closely with other departments to ensure that our products meet international standards and customer expectations. This position requires a deep understanding of chemical engineering principles, hands-on laboratory skills, and proficiency in chemical testing methodologies. Your ability to work in a fast-paced environment and ensure consistent quality will be key to your success in this role. 
 
 To excel in this position, we seek candidates who possess a Bachelor’s degree in Chemical Engineering or a related field. A minimum of five to ten years of experience in the chemical industry, particularly within a laboratory setting, is required. Strong skills in chemical analysis, laboratory operations, and chemical testing are essential for this role. If you are passionate about quality assurance and are committed to delivering exceptional results, we invite you to apply. We value diversity and inclusion, and welcome candidates who bring unique perspectives and experiences to our team.

The Role 
 We are looking for a Senior Product & Performance Analyst who can independently drive analytics and performance insights for our clients. 
 This role goes beyond execution, you will be expected to structure problems, propose data-driven solutions, and translate insights into business impact with minimal supervision. 
 You will work closely with clients, support junior team members, and contribute to growing client accounts by identifying new opportunities and measurement improvements. This role is ideal for someone who combines strong analytical skills, performance marketing knowledge, and business acumen. 
 
 Responsibilities: 
 
 Analyze and monitor client performance data, including advanced analyses (funnel drop-off, cohort analysis, audience segmentation). 
 Independently generate insights and propose actionable recommendations to improve ROI and business outcomes. 
 Translate client business needs into analytical solutions and identify opportunities for further analysis or optimization. 
 Forecast and estimate potential business impact of initiatives and performance changes. 
 Ideate and plan data-driven solutions leveraging analytics and digital marketing capabilities. 
 Present insights and recommendations to clients while managing communication and relationships. 
 Assist analytics manager on project deliverables and timelines, reporting bottlenecks, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. 
 Support senior stakeholders in business development initiatives, including identifying upsell opportunities. 
 
 
 Experience & Skills: 
 
 Minimum 3-4 years in marketing analytics, product analytics, or performance analytics.  Exposure to project coordination or project management is a preferred. 
 Familiarity with analytics tools, especially Google Analytics (GA4) and AppsFlyer, including the ability to explain their core features and use cases. 
 Understanding of performance marketing platforms (Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Programmatic), including audience targeting, budgeting, and bidding strategies. 
 Strong ability to translate analysis into clear insights and well-structured, client-ready presentations. 
 Understanding of performance marketing platforms and key metrics (CAC, LTV, ROI, conversion rates). 
 Familiarity with attribution and marketing effectiveness measurement, including understanding of the marketing technology such as conversion tracking, attribution setup, CRM, etc.  
 Comfortable with external and client facing responsibilities. 
 Professional working proficiency in Bahasa Indonesia and English (written and spoken). 
 Experience in consulting, tech, or e-commerce is a plus. 
 Experience in owned channel (SEO, push notifications), A/B testing, and/or AI/ML is a plus. 
 Has an agile mindset, curiosity, and eagerness to learn and adapt with new technologies, trends, and client landscapes.

We provide C-suite executives and start-up Founders with industry-leading digital marketing and data analytics solutions.

Deskripsi:
Kami sedang merekrut  C++ Software Engineer  untuk membangun komponen perangkat lunak yang andal, mudah dirawat (maintainable), dan berperforma tinggi yang akan digunakan dalam produk nyata. Anda akan mengerjakan implementasi sistem inti, peningkatan performa, serta pekerjaan integrasi pada codebase yang terus berkembang. 
 Ini adalah peran engineering yang sangat hands-on dengan kepemilikan yang jelas: Anda akan membawa fitur dari kondisi yang masih ambigu → desain → implementasi → pengujian → rilis. 
 
 
 Tanggung Jawab  
 
 Merancang, mengimplementasikan, dan memelihara komponen C++ yang digunakan di sistem produksi (fokus Windows) 
 Membangun software yang tangguh, mudah dibaca, dan berperforma baik 
 Men-debug isu kompleks (crash, masalah memori, undefined behavior, bug concurrency, kegagalan integrasi) 
 Melakukan profiling dan meningkatkan performa (CPU, memori, I/O) dengan optimisasi yang pragmatis 
 Melakukan integrasi dengan komponen/layanan lain (input/output file, proses lokal, API) 
 Berkontribusi pada praktik engineering yang rapi:
     
 code review 
 dokumentasi 
 disiplin build/release 
 cakupan test dasar dan pencegahan regresi 
 
 
 Berkolaborasi dalam pengembangan dan mengoordinasikan deliverable bersama tim pengembang plugin dari partner eksternal. 
 
 
 Kualifikasi Wajib  
 
 Mahir modern C++ (diutamakan C++17/20) 
 Fondasi yang kuat:
     
 struktur data dan algoritma 
 manajemen memori 
 debugging dan profiling 
 
 
 Pengalaman bekerja pada codebase yang tidak kecil (pekerjaan profesional, open-source, atau proyek pribadi yang substansial) 
 Nyaman menggunakan Git dan bekerja secara kolaboratif 
 
 
 Nilai Tambah  
 
 Salah satu atau lebih dari berikut merupakan nilai plus yang kuat: 
 
 
 Systems thinking: terbiasa berpikir dalam interface, invariants, failure modes, serta tradeoff (kebenaran vs kecepatan vs maintainability) 
 Performance mindset: mampu melakukan profiling, menemukan bottleneck, dan mengoptimasi berdasarkan bukti 
 Reliability mindset: pengalaman membangun software yang tetap stabil saat input buruk, kegagalan parsial, atau kebutuhan berubah 
 Pengalaman SDK/plugin: pernah bekerja dengan API/SDK pihak ketiga dan memahami versioning, kompatibilitas, serta packaging 
 Literasi geometri/struktur data: nyaman bernalar tentang data terstruktur dan konsep geometri dasar (koordinat, transformasi, toleransi) saat dibutuhkan 
 Eksposur integrasi ML: pengalaman mengonsumsi output model ML (output berbasis file atau inferensi lokal) dan mengubahnya menjadi perilaku software yang deterministik 
 Komunikasi yang kuat: mampu mengubah kebutuhan yang masih vague menjadi rencana yang bisa dibangun dan berkomunikasi jelas dengan stakeholder non-C++
Benefit: career growth

Employment Type: Full-time 
 
 About the Role: 
 We are looking for a highly skilled and self-driven Full-Stack Developer to take ownership of Masaya Trip's website and internal IT infrastructure. You will be responsible for maintaining our web presence, optimizing technical SEO, integrating third-party travel APIs, and setting up automated workflows to support our growing travel business. 
 
 The ideal candidate is a problem-solver with a "hacker" mindset who is comfortable working across the entire tech stack—from frontend user interfaces to backend server deployments and containerization. 
 
 Key Responsibilities: 
 Website Development & Optimization: Maintain and upgrade the Masaya Trip website. Ensure high availability, fast loading speeds, and responsive design across all devices. 
 
 Technical SEO Implementation: Execute technical SEO strategies, including Schema markup (Structured Data), Core Web Vitals optimization, and URL architecture improvements. 
 
 API Integration: Develop and manage robust connections with external third-party services, including OTA platforms (e.g., Trip.com), payment gateways, and enterprise email systems. 
 
 Server & Infrastructure Management: Oversee the company's servers, NAS storage, and local network setups. Proficiently use containerization tools (Docker) for deploying and managing internal applications and web services. 
 
 Automation & Innovation: Build internal automation scripts to streamline business operations. Assist in exploring and deploying modern tech solutions (including open-source AI tools) to improve workflow efficiency. 
 
 Requirements: 
 Experience: 3+ years of proven experience as a Full-Stack Developer or IT Engineer, with a portfolio of successful web deployments. 
 Frontend Mastery: Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and at least one modern frontend framework (React.js or Vue.js). 
 Backend & Database: Solid experience with backend languages (Python, Node.js, or PHP) and relational database management (MySQL / PostgreSQL). 
 DevOps & Deployment: Hands-on experience with Linux environments, Docker, Git, and remote server management. 
 Problem-Solving Skills: Excellent troubleshooting skills with the ability to diagnose hardware, network, and software issues independently. 
 Language: Proficient in English (written and spoken) for reading technical documentation and communicating effectively with the international team. 
 
 Bonus: Previous experience in the travel/hospitality tech industry is a huge plus.
Tentang_Perusahaan:
Masaya Tour, the premier travel brand under our parent company, Masaya Asia Limited. "Masaya" means "happy" in Filipino, and that single idea is the foundation of everything we do. 
 Based in Hong Kong with offices in Bali, Manila, Taipei, Beijing, Shanghai, Chengdu, and Osaka, we are a vibrant community of explorers dedicated to making travel seamless, rewarding, and exciting.

Deskripsi:
We’re hiring a Senior Software Engineer to lead the development and evolution of our internal ERP system, landing platform, mobile application, and overall engineering architecture. This role is expected to take strong ownership across development life cycle, system design, technical decision-making, and infrastructure reliability while helping elevate engineering standards across the team. 
 
 What You’ll Do:  
 
 Lead end-to-end (fullstack) development for Landing Pages, ERP System modules, Mobile Apps, and API integrations. 
 Translate business and product requirements into scalable technical solutions, clear implementation plans, and system architecture. 
 Design robust system architecture, database schemas, and technical flows that support performance, scalability, and maintainability. 
 Drive system design decisions across backend, frontend, infrastructure, and integration layers. 
 Develop and maintain web app and/or mobile app features or integrations, ensuring seamless communication between apps, APIs, and internal systems. 
 Own and improve server setup, deployment workflows, environment configuration, system security, and infrastructure reliability. 
 Collaborate with Project Managers, UI/UX, QA, and other Engineers to ensure smooth delivery and strong product quality. 
 Review, test, and validate development outputs before submission to QA/Testers to ensure functionality, stability, and compliance with engineering standards. 
 Conduct code reviews, query reviews, and technical reviews to maintain consistency, quality, and performance across the engineering team. 
 Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues across systems, applications, servers, and integrations within the Wilopo ecosystem. 
 Support CI/CD setup and improvement to ensure efficient and reliable deployment workflows. 
 Work with external partners or vendors on technical integrations, coordination, implementation, and issue resolution. 
 Mentor junior and mid-level engineers, provide technical guidance, and contribute to a strong engineering culture. 
 Continuously identify opportunities to improve system performance, engineer productivity, code quality, and technical processes. 
 
 
 What We’re Looking For:  
 
 5+ years of experience as a Software Engineer or equivalent role, with strong exposure to both backend and frontend development. 
 Proven experience leading or owning complex technical implementations in a production environment. 
 Strong understanding of system design, software architecture, design patterns, and scalable application development. 
 Solid experience in database design, SQL queries, relational data modeling, and performance optimization. 
 Hands-on experience building or contributing to web apps and/or mobile apps and supporting their API or backend integrations. 
 Strong experience integrating RESTful APIs and working with JSON-based data structures. 
 Hands-on experience in DevOps and server management, including server setup, deployment, configuration, monitoring, and troubleshooting. 
 Good understanding of server security, access control, environment configuration, and infrastructure best practices. 
 Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, deployment automation, and tools such as GitHub Actions, Docker, and Kubernetes. 
 Ability to write clean, maintainable, secure, and testable code with high engineering standards. 
 Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to debug and resolve complex issues efficiently. 
 Experience working in an Agile environment and collaborating cross-functionally with Product/Project Managers, QA, and engineers. 
 Strong ownership, leadership, and decision-making ability in technical execution. 
 Experience working with external partners or vendors for system integrations, coordination, or technical delivery. 
 
 
 Bonus Points If:  
 
 Proficiency in React Native and/or Flutter. 
 Proficiency in PHP (preferably Laravel) and JavaScript frameworks such as Vue.js, React, or similar. 
 You’ve worked on ERP systems, internal tools, or complex enterprise applications. 
 You have experience in unit testing, test automation, code review, and quality-driven development. 
 You’ve led technical initiatives, mentored engineers, or played a key role in shaping engineering standards. 
 You use AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to improve productivity and code quality. 
 You have experience improving engineering workflows, deployment processes, or infrastructure reliability at scale. 
 
 
 When Proceeding with the User Interview: 
 
 Be ready to showcase your project, it’s to show how you approach fullstack development and ensure code quality across backend and frontend layers. 
 Demonstrate your understanding of system design, from logic to data flow, and how you translate business needs into scalable technical solutions.  
 Share examples of challenges you’ve solved—especially debugging, optimization, or CI/CD automation. 
 Highlight how you mentor or support peers and contribute to a positive engineering culture. 
 Discuss how you stay current with new technologies and apply them to improve team efficiency. 
 
 
 Side Notes:  
 
 You’ll also be responsible for architecting reliable system structures and reusable components that the engineering team can build upon. 
 We value creativity, initiative, and ownership—bring your ideas, question assumptions, and help us raise the quality bar. 
 Most importantly, have fun while solving meaningful challenges.

If so, we're looking for you! At  Jejakin , we're on a mission to empower organizations to achieve their sustainability goals. We're seeking a  Senior Backend Engineer  to join our team and help us build and maintain the core services that drive our platform. You'll play a crucial role in designing, developing, and deploying high-performance applications that handle complex data and integrate with various technologies, ensuring they meet the highest standards of security, reliability, and availability.

 Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Mathematics, Physics, or a related technical field.

 Strong proficiency in Java  with the ability and willingness to transition to Kotlin.

 Solid knowledge of databases, including PostgreSQL and MongoDB. 
 Have an experience with at least one major cloud provider: AWS, Azure, or GCP. 
 Demonstrable experience with unit testing. 
 Comfortable reading and understanding technical documentation and API specifications. 
 Familiarity with RESTful APIs and gRPC. 
 Proficiency with Kafka, Redis, and Elasticsearch/OpenSearch. 
 Experience with CI/CD tools, preferably Jenkins. 
 Understanding of Secure Software Development Lifecycle (Secure SDLC). 
 Proactive attitude with a strong sense of ownership and the ability to thrive in a dynamic, stretch-oriented environment. 
 
 
 Job Description: 
 
 Develop and maintain backend services using Kotlin and Spring Boot, adhering to engineering best practices. 
 Architect and implement solutions for a microservices environment. 
 Design and manage relational and non-relational databases, including PostgreSQL and MongoDB. 
 Ensure code quality and reliability through unit testing and other testing methodologies. 
 Optimize application performance and scalability, with a focus on system availability and reliability. 
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features in an agile startup culture. 
 Implement secure coding practices and contribute to our Secure SDLC to ensure a high standard of security. 
 Handle CI/CD pipelines using tools like Jenkins. 
 Work with and deploy applications on a major cloud provider (AWS, Azure, or GCP). 
 Integrate with various technologies like Kafka, Redis, Elasticsearch/OpenSearch, and gRPC. 
 Actively read and understand technical documentation and API specifications to effectively implement and integrate new technologies.
Tentang_Perusahaan:
Jejakin aims to help tackle several environmental issues and help businesses to understand their carbon footprints, plan and monitor conservation and reforestation programs in making sure all are successful, measure the impact of each of the program (i.e. carbon absorption, water infiltration, air condition, and biodiversity), and offset their carbon emission or trade their carbon storage in our carbon exchange and marketplace. We encourage businesses and organizations to do well and do good.  
 Our long-term goal is to address different environmental issues by actively helping businesses and consumers to further understand their carbon footprint and allow them to easily access our technology to offset it.

Australian Technology Consulting Firm 
 Position Available: Senior Backend API Engineer (Remote) 
 We are an Australian-based technology and business consulting firm seeking a highly skilled, results-driven Senior Backend API Engineer to support our Australian clients on cutting-edge digital platforms. This is a remote opportunity working on high-impact projects for leading Australian organisations in sports, media, and entertainment. 
 You will be responsible for architecting the "engine room" of world-class digital experiences. From building scalable API Marketplaces to engineering high-concurrency data engines, you will work with modern tech stacks to deliver measurable business outcomes in a fast-paced, agile environment. 
 
 The Role: Backend API Engineer 
 Focus: Architecting robust server-side logic, polyglot data persistence, and scalable API ecosystems. 
 
 Required Skills: 
 Expert Node.js & TypeScript: Deep proficiency in NestJS or Express for building enterprise-grade services. 
 API Design & Strategy: Advanced knowledge of RESTful patterns, GraphQL (Apollo), and OpenAPI/Swagger specifications. 
 Polyglot Persistence: Strong experience selecting and implementing the right database for the use case (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, DynamoDB, or MySQL). 
 High-Performance Caching: Practical experience with Redis or Memcached for session management and API response caching. 
 Cloud Architecture: Hands-on experience with AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, AppSync, S3) and serverless workflows. 
 Platform Engineering: Experience with API Management (e.g., Kong, Tyk) including rate-limiting, throttling, and multi-tenancy. 
 Security & Auth: Strong implementation skills with OAuth2.0, OpenID Connect, and JWT at scale. 
 
 What We're Looking For 
 MUST-HAVE Qualities: 
 
 Scalability Mindset: You design systems that don't just work—they scale to handle millions of concurrent requests during peak events. 
 Results-Driven: You focus on delivering functional, high-performance outcomes, not just writing code. 
 Fast Learner: You can pivot quickly between different client codebases and business domains. 
 Strong Communication: You can clearly articulate technical decisions and architectural trade-offs in English. 
 Quality-Obsessed: You take pride in writing clean, well-tested (TDD), and maintainable code. 
 
 Language Requirement: 
 
 Professional working proficiency in English (written and spoken) is MANDATORY. 
 You will collaborate daily with Australian teams via Slack, Zoom, and Jira. 
 
 Project Examples & Impact 
 Your work will directly power major Australian brands through projects like: 
 
 API Marketplace Development: Building a secure, multi-tenant platform for API discovery, subscription management, and usage-based tracking. 
 Real-Time Sports Data: Engineering the backend for high-traffic platforms serving millions of fans with live-streaming and real-time statistics. 
 Media & Content Hubs: Orchestrating complex metadata and content delivery APIs for national broadcasters. 
 Integrated Ecosystems: Developing API layers that bridge CRM, business intelligence, and third-party partner integrations. 
 
 Ready to Apply? 
 If you are a backend specialist who loves building the invisible infrastructure that powers the modern web, this is your opportunity. Join us and turn your technical expertise into real-world business impact for Australia's leading organisations.

Job Description  
 We are seeking an Augmented Reality (AR) Developer to design and build AR applications using Unity, AR Foundation, ARCore, and ARKit, while integrating Computer Vision and Machine Learning models to create immersive, intelligent solutions for Industry 4.0. The ideal candidate will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-performance, user-centric AR experiences that drive innovation in industrial environments.  
 
 Key Responsibilities  
 
 Develop AR applications using Unity (C#), AR Foundation, ARKit/ARCore, or Vuforia for mobile devices and AR glasses (e.g., HoloLens)    
 Integrate computer vision models (object detection, OCR, segmentation) into AR pipelines for real-time analysis and visualization    
 Design and implement tracking solutions (marker-based, marker-less, SLAM) to ensure accurate spatial alignment and stable AR experiences in industrial environments    
 Collaborate with CV engineers to build APIs and interfaces that connect AR apps with backend inference systems    
 Optimize AR applications for performance, stability, and usability under challenging conditions (low light, moving machinery, large-scale environments)   
 Prototype and test AR features to evaluate feasibility, reliability, and value for industrial operations   
 Maintain and document AR codebase, ensuring scalability and reusability across multiple projects   
 Stay up to date with the latest AR/VR, XR, and CV technologies and recommend improvements  
 
 
 Qualification  
 
 Bachelor's or master’s in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electrical/Electronic Engineering, or related fields 
 Hands-on experience developing an AR application in Unity (C#) and AR Development (AR Foundation, ARKit, ARCore, Vuforia) 
 Experience with Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and/or Computer Vision is a plus 
 Strong programming background in C# and Python 
 Strong verbal and written communication skills in English 
 Ability to work independently with minimal supervision 
 Willing to stay and work in Bandung 
 
 
 Essential Competencies  
 
 Unity  
 C#  
 Python  
 Augmented Reality

Deskripsi:
I. Keterampilan Kunci dan Analisis (Wajib) 
 Pemecahan Masalah (Problem Solving) : 
 
 Wajib memiliki rekam jejak yang terbukti dalam mengidentifikasi, mendiagnosis, dan menyelesaikan bug kompleks serta masalah performa aplikasi secara efisien, baik di front-end maupun back-end. 
 Mampu menganalisis akar masalah (root cause analysis) secara mendalam, bukan hanya memperbaiki gejala. 
 
 Analisis Proaktif : 
 
 Mampu menganalisis masalah yang mungkin muncul kemudian hari (risiko teknis, bottleneck performa, isu skalabilitas) berdasarkan desain dan implementasi saat ini. 
 Berperan aktif dalam meninjau desain arsitektur dan kode untuk mengidentifikasi area yang rentan terhadap kegagalan atau pemeliharaan yang sulit. 
 Kemampuan merancang solusi yang tahan masa depan (future-proof) dan mudah dipertahankan (maintainable). 
 
 
 II. Persyaratan Teknis (Wajib) 
 A. Front-End Development 
 
 Vue.js: Pengalaman yang kuat dalam membangun Single Page Application (SPA) menggunakan Vue.js (versi terbaru lebih diutamakan). 
 State Management: Mahir menggunakan state management seperti Vuex atau Pinia. 
 Modern Web Tech: Pemahaman mendalam tentang HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), dan framework CSS (misalnya Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, atau sejenisnya). 
 Integrasi API: Pengalaman dalam mengintegrasikan RESTful API. 
 
 B. Back-End Development 
 
 Node.js & Express.js: Pengalaman solid dalam membangun server-side application dan RESTful API menggunakan Node.js dan framework seperti Express.js atau framework modern lainnya. 
 Asynchronous Programming: Pemahaman yang kuat tentang konsep asinkron di Node.js. 
 Security: Pengetahuan tentang praktik keamanan web dasar (misalnya otentikasi/otorisasi, sanitasi input, pencegahan XSS/CSRF). 
 
 C. Database 
 
 SQL Server: Keahlian dalam desain, implementasi, dan pengelolaan basis data menggunakan Microsoft SQL Server. 
 SQL: Mahir dalam menulis query SQL yang kompleks, efisien, dan teroptimasi (optimized). 
 
 
 III. Nilai Tambah (Plus Points) 
 
 Stored Procedure: Pengalaman dan penguasaan dalam membuat, memelihara, dan mengoptimalkan Stored Procedure, Function, dan Trigger di SQL Server adalah nilai tambah yang besar (Hal Plus). 
 Testing: Pengalaman dengan Unit Testing (misalnya Jest, Mocha) dan End-to-End Testing. 
 DevOps: Familiar dengan Git, proses CI/CD, dan deployment ke cloud platform (misalnya Azure, AWS, GCP). 
 Arsitektur: Pemahaman tentang pola desain (design patterns) dan arsitektur software (e.g., MVC, Microservices). 
 
 
 IV. Kualifikasi Umum 
 Gelar Sarjana di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait (atau pengalaman kerja yang setara). 
 Pengalaman kerja profesional sebagai Web Developer (Full-Stack atau fokus pada front-end/back-end yang relevan). 
 Kemampuan bekerja dalam tim, komunikasi yang baik, dan keterbukaan terhadap feedback dan code review.

Deskripsi:
Role Overview 
 
 We're looking for a Backend Software Engineer with strong fundamentals in any backend language (Go, Python, PHP/Laravel, Node.js, Java, or similar) who wants to grow into Ruby on Rails. You don't need prior Rails experience — we provide a structured 4-week onboarding program with pair programming and mentoring from senior engineers. 
 
 You will join the team that owns our consumer-facing application: product discovery, booking flow, payment flow, reviews, and user account management. You will take ownership of features from design through deployment and maintenance, working closely with Product, QA, and DevOps. 
 
 What You'll Do 
 
 - Develop and maintain backend features in our Rails monolith and contribute to Go/TypeScript microservices 
 - Design scalable, high-performance data models and APIs 
 - Improve codebase quality by implementing best practices and reducing technical debt 
 - Drive improvements to key parts of the application (e.g., booking and payment flows) to enhance performance 
 - Participate in breaking down our monolith into well-designed services where it makes sense 
 - Own rollout strategies for new features: staging, testing, deployment, monitoring, and rollback plans 
 - Drive and participate in code reviews; uphold and improve coding standards 
 - Collaborate closely with Product Managers, QA, DevOps, and Data teams 
 
 Our Tech Stack 
 
 - Ruby on Rails (primary — you will learn this) 
 - MySQL Aurora, Memcached, Redis 
 - Sidekiq for background jobs 
 - Elasticsearch for search 
 - AWS: EC2, RDS, S3, EKS 
 - Go and TypeScript for microservices 
 
 What We're Looking For 
 
 - 2+ years of backend development experience in any language (Go, Python, PHP, Node.js, Java, etc.) 
 - Strong understanding of MVC architecture, REST APIs, and relational databases (MySQL or similar) 
 - Experience building and optimizing consumer-facing web applications 
 - Comfort owning features end-to-end: design, implementation, rollout, and monitoring 
 - Experience improving existing codebases, not just greenfield work 
 - Excellent communication skills; able to push back constructively on unclear requirements 
 - Growth mindset — enthusiastic about learning new technologies 
 
 Nice to Have 
 
 - Experience with Ruby on Rails 
 - Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS) 
 - Experience with message queues (Kafka/Redis) 
 - Experience with Docker/Kubernetes 
 
 What We Offer 
 
 - Structured Rails onboarding program (4 weeks dedicated learning) 
 - Pair programming with senior engineers 
 - AI-assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code) 
 - Career growth at a profitable restaurant marketplace (Bangkok & Singapore) 
 - Remote-first work setup 
 - Core hours overlap: 10:00-18:00 GMT+7 
 - Working language: English 
 
 How You Work (Culture Fit) 
 
 - Low-ego and collaborative: you care about the best solution, not being right 
 - Proactive: you take initiative with the team's support and context 
 - Candid: you give and receive constructive feedback openly 
 - Data-driven: you lean on metrics and evidence 
 - User-focused: you care about the experience for real users 
 - Continuous learner and team player

As a premier restaurant reservation platform, we specialize in providing diners with unique fixed-price menus and hassle-free booking experiences. Our mission is to empower restaurants and food enthusiasts by bridging the gap between technology and exceptional dining. 
 At HungryHub, we thrive on innovation, collaboration, and a customer-centric approach. Our talented team of engineers, designers, and strategists work together to create impactful solutions that elevate the dining experience for both restaurants and customers. Whether you’re a tech enthusiast or a foodie at heart, HungryHub offers an exciting opportunity to make a meaningful impact in the restaurant industry while growing your career in a supportive and forward-thinking environment.

 Berkoordinasi dengan owner untuk kelayakan desain untuk produksi massal, menyesuaikan desain agar: Efisien biaya, mudah diproduksi, minim cacat produksi, bekerja sama dengan tim produksi terkait (Pola, bahan, teknik jahit) 
 
 6. Kontrol Produk 
 Menetapkan standar kualitas desain & produk, mengecek hasil produksi awal (pilot / first batch), memberi rekomendasi perbaikan jika ada masalah kualitas, menganalisa dan mengontrol penggunaan bahan, berdiskusi dengan owner untuk costing produksi untuk menentukan harga jual, mengontrol kesesuaian desain vs hasil produksi dengan Vendor jahit ataupun tim produksi interna. 
 
 7. Evaluasi & Improvement Produk 
 Menganalisis performa produk berdasarkan (Penjualan, repeat order, komplain / feedback customer terkait produk brand), mengembangkan improvement untuk koleksi berikutnya, menghentikan atau menyempurnakan desain yang tidak perform. 
 
 
 8. Kolaborasi Tim 
 Bekerja sama dengan tim (Tim Marketing (story produk & konten), Tim Sales / Toko (insight lapangan), Tim Produksi), Memberikan edukasi produk ke tim internal bila dibutuhkan

Tentang_Perusahaan:
I Can Read® adalah tempat pelatihan Bahasa Inggris yang menggunakan metode terbaik dunia, metode ini ditemukan pada tahun 2000 oleh Antony Earnshaw dan Annabel Seargeant, dimana mereka adalah seorang psikolog Pendidikan Australia, melalui penelitian yang dilakukan selama 15 Tahun. Penelitian mereka mendasar pada bagaimana mengajarkan seorang anak belajar untuk membaca sejak dini dan bagaimana mereka mengajarkan anak yang mempunyai masalah dalam hal membaca. Metode kami merupakan yg pertama di dunia yang mengajarkan kepada para murid bagaimana menggabungkan huruf-huruf yang tidak beraturan dan menjadikannya satu suara. 
 I Can Read® menawarkan sistem pembelajaran lengkap dari reading, writing, listening, dan speaking (literacy skills) untuk anak berusia 2,5 tahun – 18 tahun. Menurut penelitan para pakar pendidikan, dalam tahun-tahun terutama di usia Golden Age.  Anak-anak cenderung lebih cepat menyerap apa yang nanti kita ajarkan kepada mereka, sesuai dengan perkembangan otak mereka yang sedang mengalami fase tercepatnya, termasuk belajar Bahasa.

PT DIGI KREASI BERSAMA, the dynamic and innovative independence media agency known as Diginomad, is seeking a talented Senior Graphic Designer to join our vibrant team in Cibeunying Kidul, Bandung, Jawa Barat, Indonesia. At Diginomad, we specialize in delivering strategic campaigns through creative solutions that amplify brand impact across various platforms. Our 360° approach encompasses social media, programmatic ads, influencer marketing (KOL), online media buying, out-of-home (OOH) advertising, and on-ground activations to create memorable experiences for our clients. 
 
 We are excited about this opportunity because we believe you can help us drive even greater success for our clients. As a Senior Graphic Designer at Diginomad, you will play a crucial role in shaping our visual identity and creating compelling designs that resonate with our audience. Your contributions will be instrumental in crafting memorable and impactful campaigns that stand out in today's competitive market. 
 
 Key Responsibilities: 
 
 - Develop and execute comprehensive branding strategies, ensuring consistency across all touchpoints.- Create logos, brand identities, and promotional materials that reflect our clients' unique personalities and values. 
 - Design visually striking graphics and illustrations that engage and inspire our target audiences. 
 - Utilize Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop to bring creative concepts to life, maintaining high standards of quality and precision. 
 - Collaborate closely with the marketing and creative teams to ensure designs align with overall brand messaging and objectives. 
 - Stay updated with the latest design trends and tools to continuously enhance your skill set and contribute to our innovative projects. 
 - Manage multiple projects simultaneously while meeting tight deadlines, demonstrating strong organizational and time management skills. 
 
 Qualifications: 
 
 We are looking for candidates who are passionate about graphic design and possess a Senior/Vocational High School education level. While we value formal education, practical experience and a keen eye for detail are equally important. We seek individuals with 1 to 3 years of experience in the field, who can bring a fresh perspective and a proven track record of delivering high-quality designs. 
 
 Desired Skills: 
 
 - Proficiency in Brand Design and Logo Design. 
 - Strong knowledge of Graphic Design principles and best practices. 
 - Expertise in Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop. 
 - Experience with Typography and Packaging Design. 
 - Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a fast-paced environment. 
 - Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with a focus on teamwork and client satisfaction. 
 
 Join us at Diginomad, where creativity meets strategy, and together we can shape the future of media and branding in Indonesia. If you are ready to take your career to the next level and contribute to a dynamic, results-driven team, we encourage you to apply. Let’s create something extraordinary together!

Deskripsi:
Company Description 
 Yang! Creative Lab is a spatial and product design studio based in Indonesia, specializing in high-concept aesthetics combined with tangible production outcomes. The studio creates physical narratives through immersive brand activations, pop-up retail modules, and customized products. Bridging the gap between 3D design and practical execution, Yang! transforms visionary concepts into reality. With a focus on crafting unique environments and experiences, the studio challenges the boundaries of design and production. 
 
 Role Description 
 This is a full-time on-site role based in South Jakarta for a Spatial & Product Designer. The designer will be responsible for conceptualizing and executing spatial and product designs that align with client needs and creative visions. Responsibilities include visual design, conducting user and market research, collaborating on product development, utilizing design thinking methodologies, and ensuring designs merge aesthetic and functional elements. Additionally, the designer will work closely with the production team to see projects through from concept to physical reality. 
 Qualifications 
 
 Minimum 2-3 years of experience in the design or art scene. 
 Strong in basic conceptualization (moodboards, design intent, and research). 
 Mastery of at least two 3D software programs, plus strong rendering capabilities. 
 Capable of design development with 2D drawings and detailed layouts. 
 Proficient in AutoCAD (or similar) to produce construction-ready architectural drawings (elevations, sections, etc.). 
 General understanding of material specifications and real-world applications. 
 Supervision experience, including site coordination and spatial understanding. 
 General understanding and basic in operating Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop 
 Fluent in operating AI tools. 
 Fluent in English. 
 Strictly respects deadlines, tasks, and team agreements. 
 Highly communicative, detail-oriented, and a team player who is open to criticism and willing to learn. 
 Background in Set Building, Architecture, Interior Design, or Industrial Design is a plus point.
Tentang_Perusahaan:
Yang! is a spatial and product design studio based in Indonesia. We operate at the intersection of high-concept aesthetics and physical production. We don’t just build spaces or booths; we create physical narratives. From immersive brand activations and pop-up retail modules to bespoke physical products, our focus is always on bridging the gap between the 3D render and the gritty reality of the workshop. We design the vibe, and we build the reality.  
 
 Let's turn "what if" into "here it is."

Deskripsi:
Dicari Design Graphic dan fotografer yang bisa membuat 
 Logo: Versi utama, versi monokrom, dan ikon untuk profil media sosial. 
 Menu: Desain buku menu fisik, menu dinding (board), atau menu digital (QR code). 
 Stasioneri & Packaging: Kartu nama, desain bungkus makanan (takeaway), kantong plastik/paper bag, hingga stiker segel. 
 Media Sosial: Template post Instagram, story, dan desain highlight. 
 Signage: Papan nama restoran di depan bangunan. 
 Foto Produk: Foto makanan berkualitas tinggi (high-res). 
 Copywriting: Teks nama menu, deskripsi makanan, harga, alamat, dan nomor kontak yang sudah final. 
 
 Di cari Fotografer yang memahami Design Graphic 
 1. Penguasaan Pencahayaan (Lighting) 
 Cahaya adalah segalanya dalam fotografı makanan. Fotografer harus tahu cara membuat makanan terlihat segar dan berdimensi, bukan malah terlihat pucat atau berminyak. 
 Mengatur Arah Cahaya: Biasanya menggunakan pencahayaan dari samping (side lighting) atau belakang (back lighting) untuk menonjolkan tekstur makanan. 
 Mengontrol Refleksi: Mampu menjinakkan kilauan berlebih pada makanan yang berminyak atau berkuah agar tetap terlihat menggiurkan, bukan kotor. 
 2. Penataan Makanan (Food Styling) 
 Seringkali fotografer makanan juga merangkap sebagai food stylist, atau minimal paham dasarnya. Makanan asli terkadang tidak "fotogenik" saat di depan kamera. 
 Mempertahankan Kesegaran: Tahu trik membuat sayuran tetap terlihat hijau segar atau daging terlihat juicy (misalnya menggunakan semprotan air atau minyak). 
 Komposisi Piring: Menata elemen makanan di atas piring agar terlihat penuh, seimbang, dan estetis. 
 3. Komposisi dan Pemilihan Sudut (Angles) 
 Setiap jenis makanan punya "sudut terbaiknya" masing-masing. Fotografer harus jeli melihat ini. 
 *Flat Lay (90°): Sangat cocok untuk makanan yang detailnya ada di bagian atas, seperti piza, mangkuk penganan (smoothie bowl), atau tata meja penuh (table setting).Angle 45°: Ini adalah sudut pandang mata manusia saat duduk di meja makan. Sangat bagus untuk menunjukkan kedalaman dan dimensi makanan. 
 *Eye-Level (0°): Sempurna untuk makanan yang berlapis atau bertumpuk tinggi seperti burger, tumpukan pancake, atau minuman berlapis. 
 4. Kecepatan dan Ketepatan Waktu 
 Makanan memiliki "usia prima" yang sangat pendek di depan kamera. Es krim meleleh, kuah sup berselaput, dan busa kopi menghilang dengan cepat. 
 Fotografer harus bisa bekerja cepat dan sudah menyiapkan set kamera serta pencahayaan sebelum makanan dihidangkan oleh koki. 
 5. Pascaproduksi (Photo Editing) 
 Proses tidak berhenti setelah tombol rana ditekan. Sentuhan digital sangat menentukan hasil akhir. 
 Koreksi Warna (Color Accuracy):Memastikan warna makanan terlihat natural dan lezat (misalnya, warna daging sapi yang merah segar, bukan keunguan). 
 Pembersihan Detail: Menghilangkan noda kecil yang mengganggu pada piring atau taplak meja digital. 
 1. Kemampuan Teknis & Penguasaan Softwarelni adalah "senjata" utama desainer untuk mewujudkan ide menjadi karya visual yang nyata. Penguasaan Software Desain: * Adobe Photoshop: Untuk manipulasi foto, digital imaging, dan pembuatan mockup. Adobe Illustrator / CorelDRAW: Untuk membuat grafis berbasis vektor seperti logo, ikon, dan ilustrasi yang tidak pecah saat diperbesar. Adobe InDesign: Untuk tata 
 letak (lavout) media cetak seperti buku, maialah, dandigital sekarang untuk mendesain tampilan aplikasi atau website (Ul/ UX). Tipografı (Typography): Seni memilih, mengatur, dan memodifikasi huruf. Desainer harus tahu jenis font apa yang memancarkan kesan formal, santai, modern, atau klasik, serta bagaimana keterbacaannya (readability). Teori Warna (Color Theory): Memahami roda warna, psikologi warna (misalnya, merah memicu lapar, biru memberi kesan dipercaya), dan kontras agar desain nyaman dilihat. 
 2. Kemampuan Konseptual & KomunikasiDesain grafis adalah bentuk komunikasi visual. Jadi, kemampuan berpikir di balik visual tersebut sangatlah krusial.Komunikasi Visual & Storytelling: Kemampuan menyampaikan pesan atau cerita yang rumit hanya melalui sebuah gambar atau infografis secara instan. Berpikir Kreatif & Pemecahan Masalah: Desain yang baik adalah solusi dari sebuah masalah. Desainer harus bisa menerjemahkan keinginan klien (yang terkadang abstrak) menjadi visual yang fungsional. Pemahaman Branding: Mengerti bagaimana sebuah logo, palet warna, dan elemen visual lainnya bekerja sama untuk membentuk identitas sebuah merek di mata publik. 
 3. Kemampuan Cetak dan DigitalSeorang desainer harus paham ke mana karya mereka akan bermuara agar tidak terjadi kesalahan fatal.Area DesainKemampuan yang DibutuhkanMedia CetakPaham perbedaan warna CMYK vs RGB, resolusi gambar (minimal 300 DPI), jenis kertas, dan area potong (bleed). Media DigitalPaham optimasi ukuran file agar tidak lambat saat di-load, rasio layar untuk media sosial, dan tren visual digital.Kemampuan Plus (Nilai Tambah di Era Sekarang)Saat ini, industri sangat menghargai desainer grafis yang punya "keahlian sampingan" seperti:Motion Graphics: Membuat elemen desain menjadi bergerak/animasi.Basic Al Tooling: Menggunakan Al (seperti Midjourney atau Adobe Firefly) untuk mempercepat proses brainstorming atau 
 mencari referensi.

 We are seeking a Senior Graphic Designer with a strong portfolio and experience in creating compelling and high-quality visual designs for diverse audiences across Indonesia, Australia, and Singapore.  Soft Skills 
 
 Strong creative vision with attention to detail.

 Work Location

 The Role 
 We're looking for a Graphic Designer who can translate brand direction and content strategy into visuals that actually work — on Instagram, in ads, and across brand touchpoints. You'll work closely with Social Media Specialists and the Ads team to produce content that looks good and performs well.

 • Develop and maintain visual brand guidelines for multiple clients

 • Work from creative briefs provided by the SM team — and push back constructively when the brief needs improving 
 • Manage multiple client visual identities simultaneously without losing consistency 
 • Adapt designs across different formats, ratios, and platform specs quickly and accurately 
 
 What We're Looking For 
 • 2–4 years of graphic design experience, ideally in a creative or digital agency 
 • Strong proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign) 
 • Solid understanding of social media formats and platform design specs 
 • Knows what makes an ad creative work — not just visually, but in terms of message and CTA 
 • Can maintain multiple brand identities without cross-contaminating visual styles 
 • Takes feedback well and iterates fast 
 • Organized — you can manage multiple briefs and deadlines without dropping anything 
 
 Nice to Have 
 • Experience designing for hospitality, F&B, or lifestyle brands 
 • A portfolio that shows range — from social content to brand identity work 
 
 What We Offer 
 • Diverse visual challenges across Bali's most interesting brands 
 • A collaborative team where your design decisions actually matter 
 • Exposure to both organic content and paid ads creative 
 • Career progression based on quality of work and impact 
 • WFO / Hybrid 
 
 Location: Bali, Indonesia 
 Type: Full-time 
 Salary: Competitive, based on experience 
 
 How to Apply

 Portfolio is required show us a mix of social media content, ad creatives, and at least one branding project.

 - Plagiarism Rescue: Restrukturisasi dokumen terindikasi plagiarisme tanpa mengorbankan orisinalitas ide.

Job Description: Event Spatial Designer (Event Industry) 
 
 We're looking for a highly creative and detail-oriented Event Spatial Designer to join our fast-paced event organizing team. This role is a perfect fit for a design professional who can not only produce stunning 2D graphics but also conceptualize and bring to life immersive event experiences using 3D design and visual storytelling through mood boards. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
 Conceptualization and Mood Boards: Collaborate with the event and creative teams to understand client visions and event themes. Translate these ideas into compelling visual concepts, creating detailed mood boards to set the aesthetic direction and tone of each project. 
 3D Event Visualization: Utilize 3D design software to create realistic renderings, virtual walkthroughs, and spatial layouts of event venues and installations. Help clients and stakeholders visualize the final event space, including stage design, decor, and overall atmosphere. 
 2D Graphic Production: Design a wide range of marketing and event collateral, including but not limited to: 
 Event logos and branding 
 Digital and print invitations, flyers, and brochures 
 Large-format graphics such as backdrops, banners, and signage 
 Social media graphics, web visuals, and digital assets 
 Project Management: Manage multiple design projects simultaneously, ensuring all deliverables are on-brand, meet quality standards, and are completed on time for production and event deadlines. 
 Collaboration: Work closely with vendors, suppliers, and our internal teams (including event planners, marketing, and production) to ensure seamless execution of all design elements. 
 Qualifications & Skills 
 
 Experience: Proven experience as a Graphic Designer, Interior Designer, with a strong portfolio that demonstrates proficiency in both 2D and 3D design. Experience in the event or a related creative industry is a significant plus. 
 Technical Proficiency: Expertise in the Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign). Proficiency in 3D design software such as Blender, SketchUp, 3ds Max, or Cinema 4D is required. 
 Creative Mindset: Exceptional creativity and a strong sense of aesthetic, with the ability to develop innovative ideas and translate them into a cohesive visual identity for an event. 
 Communication: Excellent verbal and visual communication skills, capable of presenting and defending creative concepts to both internal teams and clients. 
 Problem-Solving: The ability to troubleshoot design challenges on-site and adapt to unexpected changes with a calm, resourceful, and flexible attitude. 
 Detail-Oriented: Meticulous attention to detail in all aspects of design, from typography and color theory to final print production and file preparation 
 Job Type: Full-time
Tentang_Perusahaan:
We create a seamless journey from initial concept to the final experience, from first brief, to final encore managing all moving parts in between. 
 Our singular mission is achieving your goals by collaborating with you and your trusted teams to organize unforgettable events together. We will assimilate with your vision, helping you exceed expectations of every detail.

 	•	Shooting videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, live streaming, and marketing campaigns 
 	•	Handling camera, lighting, and basic audio setup

 	•	Collaborating with the marketing and content team to translate creative briefs into strong visuals

 	•	Keeping up with current social media and video trends (hooks, pacing, angles) 
 	•	Organizing and managing video files properly 
 	•	Working in a fast-paced environment (shoot today, publish fast) 
 
 ✅ Qualifications 
 Must Have: 
 	•	Minimum 2-4 years of experience as a videographer or content creator 
 	•	Strong experience in creating short-form videos (TikTok / Reels / Shorts) 
 	•	Proficient in video editing software (CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar) 
 	•	Good sense of composition, lighting, and storytelling 
 	•	Able to work quickly, efficiently, and under tight deadlines 
 	•	Comfortable working with dynamic teams and fast-changing briefs 
 	•	Portfolio or sample works is required 
 
 Nice to Have: 
 	•	Experience working with F&B, lifestyle, or consumer brands 
 	•	Familiar with live streaming production 
 	•	Basic knowledge of motion graphics or text animation 
 	•	Understanding of branding and marketing content 
 	•	Experience shooting with both camera and smartphone 
 
  What We Offer 
 	•	Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling brand 
 	•	Creative freedom with clear direction 
 	•	Dynamic, energetic, and collaborative work environment 
 	•	Competitive salary based on experience 
 	•	Exposure to high-volume content production and live commerce

PopENjoy is a fast growing premium snack brand on a mission to redefine snacking in Indonesia. We believe great snacks should be delicious, better for you, and accessible not filled with excessive preservatives, MSG, or unnecessary additives.

Job Description: 
 The Video Editor is responsible for editing and assembling raw video footage into a high-quality final product that meets project requirements. This includes selecting the best clips, creating a cohesive narrative, adding visual effects, sound, and text, and ensuring that the video aligns with brand guidelines and communication goals. 
 
 Main Responsibilities: 
 
 Edit and assemble raw video footage into a final product ready for release. 
 Understand the script or project concept to create an effective visual storyline. 
 Add visual effects, animations, text, and transitions as needed.

 Collaborate with the creative team to ensure the video aligns with the client's vision and expectations.

 Perform video slicing efficiently, ensuring that content is properly segmented. 
 Leverage current trends to create videos with high potential for virality and traffic generation. 
 Conduct batch video editing to streamline content creation. 
 Independently handle video shooting, editing, batch editing, and video slicing tasks.

 Qualifications : 
 
 Minimum of 1-2 years of experience as a Video Editor or a related role. 
 Proficient in video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar. 
 Basic understanding of visual effects, animation, and color correction. 
 Ability to work independently or as part of a team. 
 Creative and detail-oriented in producing engaging videos. 
 Strong time management skills and ability to work under deadlines. 
 A portfolio of videos or work samples demonstrating skills. 
 Good communication skills and ability to receive and give feedback. 
 Proven experience in video slicing, understanding and leveraging trends, batch editing, and shooting.

 Sebutkan software yang digunakan + device (PC/laptop spek singkat)
