Job Summary 
 The AI Video Editor is responsible for producing high-quality video content using AI video generation tools combined with strong video editing fundamentals. This role focuses on creating engaging short-form and long-form videos for social media and digital platforms, including cinematic, advertising, UGC, and educational content. 
 The ideal candidate is familiar with AI video tools, understands video prompting and iteration workflows, and is able to transform creative briefs into polished, platform-ready video outputs while maintaining consistency in style, pacing, and brand identity. 
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
 Create video content using AI video tools such as Kling, Veo, Runway, or Pika. 
 Develop and refine AI video prompts, including iterative improvements to achieve optimal results. 
 Edit video footage with strong attention to pacing, continuity, transitions, and visual flow. 
 Produce videos optimized for multiple platforms: (Vertical format (9:16) for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Shorts) 
 Ensure subtitle placement follows safe-area guidelines for each platform. 
 Perform basic motion graphics and captioning for social media content. 
 Apply basic color correction and light grading when required. 
 Handle basic audio editing including volume leveling and light noise reduction. 
 Manage file organization, naming conventions, and export settings properly. 
 Collaborate with the team to interpret briefs accurately and deliver revisions (2–3 rounds). 
 Deliver final outputs according to required formats (MP4 / H.264, resolution, frame rate). 
 Meet content production targets (e.g., daily output or weekly quotas as defined by the team). 
 
 
 Job Specification (Qualifications & Requirements) 
 Mandatory Requirements 
 
 Experience creating AI-generated videos using at least 1–2 AI video tools (Kling, Veo, Runway, Pika, or similar). 
 Strong understanding of AI video prompting and iterative improvement processes. 
 Solid video editing fundamentals: cutting, pacing, continuity, clean transitions. 
 Ability to produce videos for both vertical and horizontal formats. 
 Must have a video portfolio, including examples of AI-generated video content. 
 
 Editing Tools 
 
 CapCut (accepted) for fast editing, subtitles, templates, and social media formatting. 
 Adobe Premiere Pro (preferred) for professional editing workflows and project management. 
 Adobe After Effects (basic) for simple motion text, masking, and compositing. 
 DaVinci Resolve (color correction / grading) 
 
 
 Basic Photoshop for asset cleanup, cropping, retouching, or simple background extension

Deskripsi:
Location: Remote (Indonesia-based) 
 Type: Freelance (with potential to grow into full-time) 
 Language: Fluency in English is essential 
 
 About Kopi Date 
 Kopi Date is a dating programme helping singles in Singapore build healthier, more meaningful relationships. We don't do swiping. We curate intentional, offline coffee dates and combine them with relational skills education — because we believe love is a skill. 
 We're bootstrapped, profitable, and growing — built on the belief that the way people date can be better. Our members are discovering that dating can be a journey of growth, not just a search. And we need someone who can tell that story — in ads, in posts, in every word that reaches the people we're trying to help. 
 
 The Role 
 You'll take raw material — founder voice notes, winning ad concepts, member stories, raw video clips — and turn them into polished, high-performing content at speed. You'll write sharp copy, style it into scroll-stopping creatives, and edit video into reels and short-form content. But you're not just executing — you'll also ideate, pitch new angles, and bring fresh ideas when you see an opportunity. The faster and better you can produce, the more impact you'll have. 
 You’ll work remotely from Indonesia, collaborating with our small but mighty team to turn interest into action. If you’re organized, people-savvy, and eager to grow with a startup, this is your chance to shine. You will be working with globalised customers primarily English speaking.  
   
 Your role: Content editor and executor 
 Content Creation: Ideate and create high-quality educational and insightful videos from founder insights 
 
Write Powerful Ads: Create ad creatives (copy + concepts), manage performance marketing campaigns, and suggest improvements based on what you see.  
 Strong Agency and Creativity: Bring fresh ideas to the table—whether it’s a new follow-up tactic or a creative ad angle, have ownership on driving objectives and always be growing and evolving.  
 Analyze & Optimize: Track funnel performance (e.g., response rates, conversions) and share insights to make us better.  
 
 Who You Are 
 Must-haves: 
 You write fast and well in English — clear, emotional, persuasive. You don't agonise over a first draft; you produce and refine. 
 You can edit video — you're comfortable cutting raw footage into tight, engaging reels and short-form content. You don't need to be a cinematographer, but you know pacing, transitions, and what keeps people watching. 
 You have a strong eye for visual styling — typography, layout, colour, format. You think in complete creatives, not just words. 
 You understand storytelling — how to take a real human experience and turn it into something that makes a stranger feel something. 
 You're a fast executor. Given raw material and a brief, you produce finished work quickly without needing to be chased. 
 You're curious about people and relationships. You don't need to be a dating expert, but you need to find the topic genuinely interesting. 
 
 Nice-to-haves: 
 Experience writing ad copy or social media content 
 Familiarity with video editing tools (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci, or similar) 
 Familiarity with design tools (Canva, Figma, or similar) 
 Familiarity with ad platforms, Instagram/TikTok trends, or performance marketing

JOB DESC 
 
1. Produksi & Editing Video 
 
 Mengedit footage mentah menjadi video yang menarik dan sesuai dengan brand guidelines. 
 Melakukan cutting, sequencing, sound mixing, color correction, dan color grading. 
 Membuat opening title, closing screen, serta motion graphics untuk kebutuhan video promosi. 
 Menghasilkan konten video untuk media sosial, digital campaign, iklan, dan materi promosi lainnya. 
 
 2. Desain & Animasi 3D 
 
 Mendesain dan membuat model 3D produk seperti botol liquid. 
 Melakukan texturing, lighting, rendering, dan animasi 3D. 
 Membuat efek visual seperti vapor/smoke effect, product fly-through, dan logo animation. 
 Mengintegrasikan elemen 3D ke dalam video menggunakan teknik compositing. 
 
 3. Konsep Visual & Storytelling 
 
 Berkolaborasi dengan tim marketing untuk mengembangkan konsep visual dan storyboard. 
 Menerjemahkan konsep kreatif menjadi visual video yang kuat dan menarik. 
 
 4. Manajemen Aset 
 
 Mengelola dan mengorganisir footage, aset grafis, sound effect, dan file project secara rapi dan efisien. 
 
 
 KUALIFIKASI 
 
 Pendidikan :  Gelar Sarjana (S1) atau Diploma di bidang Desain Komunikasi Visual, Multimedia, Film, Animasi 3D, atau bidang terkait. 
 Pengalaman  : Minimal 1-3 tahun pengalaman profesional sebagai Video Editor, dengan portofolio yang kuat yang menampilkan kemampuan 3D modeling, texturing, rendering, dan animasi. 
 Perangkat Lunak  : Premier pro, AE, dan sejenisnya 3D Software: Blender, Cinema 4D, 3ds Max, atau Maya (sertakan software yang paling dikuasai). 
 Keterampilan  : Teknis Pemahaman yang kuat tentang prinsip-prinsip sinematografi, storytelling visual, teori warna, tipografi, sound design, dan compositing. 
 Kreativitas & Detail Mata  : yang tajam untuk detail visual, kreativitas yang tinggi, dan kemampuan menerjemahkan konsep abstrak menjadi visual yang nyata. 
 Portofolio  : Wajib menyertakan portofolio yang kuat dan relevan yang menunjukkan kemampuan video editing dan grafis 3D Anda.
